creator: eb30750@gmail.com
text:
My apologies.  It appears that this is an out of disk space issue.  I have
32 GB of disk space but I didn't remember that I partitioned it.  I have 23
GB on /usr but the virtualbox download filled up /.  I can change the
download location on pkg_add but if I do will virtualbox still behave and
launch as it was designed?
Otherwise, is there any steps I can take to "join" / and /usr without a
complete startover?

Thanks.
